name: Cranberry-Pineapple Salad Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan, sprinkle unflavored gelatin over 2 cups of water; let stand for 1 minute to soften the gelatin slightly. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until the gelatin completely dissolves. Remove from heat and stir in cherry and lemon/lime flavor gelatin until they completely dissolve. Stir in an additional 3 cups of cold water. Refrigerate until the mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon, about 1 hour.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, coarsely chop cranberries and mince celery. Add drained pineapple and sugar, stirring until the sugar completely dissolves.
3. Fold the fruit mixture into the thickened gelatin. Pour into a 10-inch Bundt pan or 12-cup mold. Cover and refrigerate until set, at least 3 hours.
4. To serve, carefully unmold the gelatin onto a chilled platter.
